titleStmt.title: SII 39.45: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 45. (A.R. No. 45 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌḶANĀTH TEMPLE-ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME MAṆḌAPA. •••••••••• ŚAKA 151[9] (1596-97 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription states that since the sacred car of the temple got damaged, a new one was made and replaced in its place by the (merchants) Nagarattar of Iḷaiyāṭṭakkuḍi. It also further mentions that the income of the village of Perunallūr about 50 poṉ and 500 kalam of paddy was set apart to meet the annual maintenence cost of the car festival. (See No. 49 below for related information).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ svastiśrī cakāttam 1000 5 100 10 9ṉ mel
cellā niṉṟa tuṉmuki varuṣam Āṉi mātam 5 10 2 cuvāmi
tirukkoḷakkuṭi yāṇṭa tampirāṉār koyiṟ
śrī paṇṭārak kāriyattukku kaṭavārum citamparanā
ta mutaliyārayyaṉ kāriyattukku kattarāṉa [śrī va]lappaṭṭa
rum Iḷaiyāttukkuṭi nakarattāṟkku tanma cācaṉap
paṭṭaiyam piṭipāṭu paṉṉik kuṭuttapaṭikku Uṭai
yāṟku muṉṉāḷ tāṅkaḷ pūṟuvam vaitta tirutter
laintu pokaiyil nāḷatu navamākat tāṅkaḷ tiru
tter vaikkaiyil tirunāḷ celavukkut taṅka
ḷaik keḻāmal koyiṟ paṇṭārattilē kaṭṭaḷai
Irukkaiyil Appaṭiye nayiṉār tevatāṉamāṉa peru
nallūrile kaṇṭa mutalilo varuṣam toṟum
varuṣam Oṉṟukku Aṉpatu poṉṉum Añ
ṟukkala nellum pattik koṇṭu koyiṟ
ṇṭārattilē tirunāḷ naṭattivarak kaṭavomākavum
teyvikamāy viḷaiyāte poṉāl tevamaṉa
ppattile viḷaiñca kiṟāmattil mutali ḷa Aṉ
poṉṉum Aññūttuk kalanellumiṭṭu varuṣa
Digital edition of SII 39.45 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
